title: Equality and denominational autonomy: The constitutional questions before the nine-judge Bench
description: A nine-judge Constitution Bench of the Supreme Court will start hearing the Sabarimala review petition in April. The Court will re-engage with the fundamental questions of the extent of the guarantee of religious freedom under Articles 25 and 26 of the Constitution.What began as a dispute over women’s access to the Sabarimala Temple has evolved into a constitutional question: whether denominational autonomy is to be considered beyond the reach of equality analysis or whether religious practice m
